query: Uganda Ebola Bundibugyo virus outbreak 2026 latest confirmed case count July 2026, any new case after 20 cumulative
answer:
Research complete. **Bottom line: Uganda's confirmed Ebola (Bundibugyo virus) case count remains at 20 — no 21st case has been reported.**

Key findings, cross-validated across multiple authoritative sources:

- **Uganda MoH dashboard (primary source, as of 12 July 2026):** 20 cumulative confirmed cases (15 imported, 5 local), 2 deaths, 17 recoveries, 1 current admission, **0 active contacts under follow-up**, 821/831 contacts completed 21-day follow-up.
- **ECDC (updated 10 July 2026):** 20 confirmed / 2 deaths; last case 21 June 2026; explicitly states "no new cases have been reported since then."
- **WHO DON612:** Uganda component = 20 confirmed cases, 2 deaths.
- **Trackers (ebolamap.org, ebola.fyi) and Wikipedia** all corroborate 20 cases / 2 deaths.

**On the specific question (any 21st case between 9–24 July):** No 21st case through 12 July 2026 (the most recent verifiable data point). The 21 June imported case reset Uganda's countdown; under WHO's 42-day rule, the outbreak-free window would run into early-to-mid August 2026. Data for 13–24 July was not yet published in accessible sources at research time.

sources.title: Ebola Updates - Uganda Ministry of Health EVD Daily Dashboard
sources.snippet: As of Sunday, 12 July 2026. 20 Cumulative confirmed cases (15 Imported, 5 Local). 1 Current admission. 17 Recoveries. 2 Cumulative deaths. 0 Active contacts under follow-up; 821 completed 21-day follow-up.

sources.title: Ebola disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda
sources.snippet: As of July 9, 2026, Uganda had reported a total of 20 confirmed cases, including two deaths. The most recent confirmed case was documented on June 21, 2026, and no new cases have been reported since then. Last updated 10 July 2026 13:43.

sources.title: Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (WHO DON612)
sources.snippet: In total, 1481 confirmed cases; 1460 from DRC, 20 from Uganda and one from France; 454 deaths including two from Uganda.

sources.title: Disease Outbreak News: Ebola caused by Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (3 July 2026)
sources.snippet: As of 2 July, Uganda has reported 20 confirmed cases including two deaths, as well as one probable case who has died.

sources.title: Ebola Map — Live Global Ebola Outbreak Tracker
sources.snippet: As of 9 July (Uganda): Uganda 20 confirmed cases and 2 deaths. DRC 1,792 confirmed cases and 625 deaths as of 8 July.

sources.title: Ebola countdown in Uganda collapses after 16 days
sources.snippet: Uganda's hopes of an Ebola-free declaration suffered a setback after health authorities confirmed a new imported Ebola case on June 21, resetting the country's countdown.

sources.title: 2026 Ebola epidemic - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: There have been confirmed deaths in DRC and two deaths in Uganda as of the second week of July 2026.

data_points.metric: Uganda cumulative confirmed Bundibugyo Ebola cases
